title: datura dubia
intro: Datura dubia, also known as devil's trumpet or moonflower, is a perennial plant native to Mexico and Central America, belonging to the nightshade family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its antispasmodic and sedative effects. The plant is known to have various health benefits, such as reducing anxiety and insomnia, and has been used to treat conditions like asthma and epilepsy. Datura dubia can be prepared into herbal remedies like teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to promote relaxation and improve sleep quality.
